message:
refactor(fcp-host): continue fcp-core to fcp-kernel import migration in fcp-host binary, test-connector, and resilience

fcp-host.rs: Move LifecycleRecord, SelfCheckStatus, TransitionReason,
UsageMetric, UsageMetricKind into #[cfg(test)] import block — these
types are only used in tests within this binary.

fcp-test-connector.rs: Move AgentHint, ApprovalMode, AuthCaps,
ConnectorId, EventCaps, FcpError, HandshakeRequest/Response,
HealthSnapshot/State, IdempotencyClass, Introspection,
InvokeRequest/Response, OperationId/Info, RequestId, SelfCheckReport,
SessionId, ShutdownRequest, SimulateRequest/Response from fcp_core to
fcp_kernel.  CapabilityId, OAuthConfig, ObjectId, RiskLevel, SafetyTier
remain in fcp_core.

resilience.rs: Move ConnectorId from fcp_core to fcp_kernel.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
